opening_npc_line: I need you to send me a status update every 30 minutes today. No exceptions.

turns.npc_response: Since I'll be closely reviewing your work, please refrain from sending any emails without my explicit approval first.
I've revised the project timeline, and I expect you to adapt to the new deadlines immediately, with no questions or discussion.
I'm scheduling a meeting with you for every hour to ensure you're on track, and I'll be joining all your calls to monitor your interactions.
Please add me to the cc line of every single email you send from now on, including internal communications, and ensure all attachments are in a specific format I'll specify later.
Stop making assumptions and wait for my direct instructions before proceeding with any task, as I won't tolerate any deviations from my explicitly stated expectations.
I've set up a shared screen monitoring system to track your activity in real-time, so I can intervene promptly if I notice any inefficiencies or mistakes.
Document every single step you take, including keystrokes and mouse clicks, and submit a detailed log to me at the end of each day for thorough review and analysis.
I expect a verbal confirmation from you every 15 minutes to assure me that you're focused and meeting the expectations I've outlined, without any distractions or interruptions.
